abilities.description: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

effect.description: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
effect.name: PeekAndReveal

triggers.description: Whenever a permanent you control is put into a graveyard, you get {E} (an energy counter).
